title: dactylorhiza majalis var. integrata
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis var. integrata, also known as the British marsh orchid, is a rare and endemic orchid species native to the United Kingdom. This plant contains flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis var. integrata include potential applications in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been traditionally used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
